name: Celesta Credit Card

rewards.category: utilities, insurance, government, education, real estate, rent
rewards.displayCategory: Utility, insurance, government, education, real estate, and rent spends

domestic: Unlimited complimentary domestic lounge access (effective July 2026 quarter onwards, requires minimum spend of ₹1,50,000 in the previous quarter to unlock access)
international: 2 complimentary international lounge visits per calendar quarter via Priority Pass

exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee reversed on spends of ₹10,00,000 or more in the card anniversary year
additionalBenefits: Complimentary Club Marriott and EazyDiner Prime memberships with dining vouchers worth ₹3,000 twice a year
Tablet Plus membership offering VIP upgrades and privileges at luxury hotels worldwide
Buy 1 Get 1 free movie tickets up to 3 times a month (up to ₹700 discount per ticket) on BookMyShow plus 20% off on events/theatre
Complimentary golf games and golf lessons monthly at select courses in India
24x7 complimentary concierge services and Auto Assist roadside assistance
Comprehensive insurance cover including Personal Air Accident Cover up to ₹2.5 Crores and Travel Insurance
1% fuel surcharge waiver at all petrol pumps in India

salaried: Minimum net monthly salary of ₹2,50,000 or Priority/Pioneer Banking relationship
selfEmployed: Minimum annual income/ITR of ₹30 Lakhs or Priority/Pioneer Banking relationship

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Effective April 1, 2026, spends criteria tracking of ₹1.5 Lakh per quarter is initiated to unlock domestic lounge access from July 2026 quarter onwards.
Cash credit redemption is capped at 10,000 reward points per calendar month, and is capped at 50% of the total rewards balance.
Redemption towards Club Vistara discontinued effective Oct 31, 2024. Redemption towards InterMiles discontinued effective Jan 21, 2025.
